## Meeting Purpose

[Final sync with Vivek, reviewing progress and demoing the new LLM tracking tool.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Sessions are on pace to surpass December highs, and non-branded impressions are recovering to last year's April-May levels.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [**LLM Tracking Transition:** GrowthX is replacing Scrunch with CheckNet, a new tool that provides immediate historical data for library prompts and allows for more granular, custom tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Strategic Challenge:** Strapi's current CheckNet category ("Website Builders") is too broad, forcing competition against giants like Webflow and WordPress. The immediate priority is defining a more specific category (e.g., "Headless CMS") to get accurate, actionable data.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The goal is to create content that *earns* citations for specific prompts, not just create prompts that *find* existing content. LLM-friendly content requires strong SEO fundamentals plus a "chunked" structure with self-contained sections.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Content

  - [**Content Delivery:** Two new "write-away" blogs based on the Purcell article are delivered and awaiting review in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Performance Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [**Sessions:** On pace to exceed December's high.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [**Top Articles:** "API project ideas" (published Oct) is now a consistent top performer.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Impressions:** Recovering to April-May 2025 levels.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** January is sluggish.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
          - [**Reason:** Users often get answers directly from LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT) without clicking through to the source URL.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
          - [**Implication:** Referral traffic alone is an incomplete measure of LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

### CheckNet Demo & Strategy

  - [**CheckNet Overview:**](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Track LLM citations and trends, replacing Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
          - [**Immediate Historical Data:** Library prompts (shared across a category) provide up to 90 days of data instantly.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
          - [**Unlimited Library Prompts:** These don't count against a custom prompt limit, enabling more granular tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
          - [**Custom Prompts:** Remain private to Strapi for competitive advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [**Strategic Challenge: Category Mismatch**](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
      - [**Problem:** The default "Website Builders" category forces competition against giants like Webflow and WordPress, skewing performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Solution:** Define a more specific category (e.g., "Headless CMS") to track relevant developer-focused prompts and get accurate, actionable insights.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Content Strategy for LLMs**](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create content that *earns* citations for specific prompts (e.g., for frontend developers), rather than just finding existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**Core Principles:**](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
          - [**Strong SEO Fundamentals:** 80–90% of LLM prioritization is traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
          - [**"Chunked" Structure:** Content must be human-readable but structured for AI consumption, with self-contained sections under clear headings.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
          - [**No Thin Content:** Avoid short articles on complex topics, as Google may flag them, hurting overall SEO and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)

### Outstanding Action Items

  - [**Comparison Page Reviews:** Notum is pushing the fix to production today or tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**CTA Text Color:** Theo has shared the issue with Notum.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Form Example:** Theo to share an example with Carrie to unblock future integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Airtable View:** Carrie to create a unified view of in-production topics for the Strapi team.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Theo:** Share form example with Carrie.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Create the unified Airtable view.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Carrie & Vivek:** Define a more specific CheckNet category for Strapi (e.g., "Headless CMS").](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Add custom prompts from Scrunch to CheckNet.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=2255.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Finalize and communicate the free access period for CheckNet.](https://fathom.video/share/pt-9RFT-JS_b-VHsmMtkf_8xzjRgHQnK?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
